the-human-inversion: When capable AI absorbs most artifact production between foundation and review, human leverage shifts to those two ends—and teams need new patterns for coherence, hiring, attention, and durable write integrity. This series traces that inversion: why it is economically forced, what breaks when the old execution "middle" stops carrying cross-disciplinary translation, and how orgs can staff the foundation and review layers without collapsing back into meeting-heavy coordination.
